'''''Centurion''''' was a [[Broadside-class cruiser kdb-1|''Broadside''-class cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Behind the scenes==
"[[Wikipedia:Centurion|Centurion]]" was a rank in [[Wikipedia:Ancient Rome|Ancient Rome]], and the name of seven [[Wikipedia:Royal Navy|Royal Navy]] vessels.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
